title: HORROR In the fog [BACKROOMS]
body:
![image 1.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f484cdb8a16593f98f787d3e8d3baf1c2f60626b.png)

This horror modpack transforms Minecraft into a dark, unsettling survival experience. 

The nights are longer, the shadows feel alive, and every sound could mean danger. 

Mysterious creatures stalk you from the darkness, psychological horror elements keep you constantly on edge, and the environment itself feels hostile and unpredictable.
